candidates.hypothesis: Reduce critic target magnitude while keeping reward semantics, GAE, and actor observation unchanged.

candidates.hypothesis: Keep value_target_scale=50.0 but restore conservative v62c-like PPO update pressure to isolate the v62d_001 update-pressure confounder.

decision.reason: Conservative PPO improved v62d_001 but still regressed velocity, done, reward, and action_delta versus v62c 7M.

candidates.hypothesis: Double the generic command velocity-error coefficient so the tracker pays more attention to desired trajectory velocity instead of winning spatial tracking by aggressive chasing.
candidates.training_command: pixi run -e gpu python scripts/train_v62_brax_reference_command_tracker.py --lane-name v62d_003_velocity_coef_2x_30m --config level3_tracker_free_space.toml --seed 26431 --num-envs 1024 --num-steps 32 --total-timesteps 30015488 --num-minibatches 4 --update-epochs 1 --checkpoint-interval 5000000 --checkpoint-path lsy_drone_racing/control/checkpoints/v62d_003_velocity_coef_2x_30m/v62d_003_velocity_coef_2x_30m_final.pkl --summary-json experiments/level3_ppo_loop/analysis/tracker_stage_metrics/v62d_003_velocity_coef_2x_30m_summary.json --action-distribution tanh_squashed_gaussian --command-vel-error-coef 1.2 --value-target-scale 1.0 --eval-rollouts 16 --wandb-enabled --wandb-mode online --wandb-project-name ADR-PPO-Racing-Level3 --wandb-entity aojili77-technical-university-of-munich --wandb-run-name v62d_003_velocity_coef_2x_30m --wandb-run-id v62d_003_velocity_coef_2x_30m_20260627 --jax-device gpu

decision.reason: Velocity improved only 2.4%, below the 10%-15% promotion threshold, and action_delta worsened 7.9x versus v62c 7M.

candidates.hypothesis: Rebalance the command generator toward speed-bin coverage, brake ramps, low-speed-through, and recover-speed transitions so speed obedience is learned from reference horizons instead of a larger scalar velocity penalty.

changed_knobs.generator_velocity_distribution: explicit speed bins, longer brake ramps, longer low-speed-through, longer recover transitions
